# User Story Template

## User Story
As a **[type of user]**,  
I want **[feature]**,  
so that **[benefit]**.
- **[Num story points]** story points

## Description
Provide more detail about the feature or change being requested.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2
- [ ] Requirement 3

## Technical Notes
(Optional) Any implementation ideas, libraries, or constraints.

## Related Files / Components
List any files or parts of the system this might affect.

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code implemented
- [ ] Tests added
- [ ] Pull request created
- [ ] Code reviewed
